---
title: "Julian Berger"
about:
  template: broadside
  image: "Berger_Julian_Oct2022.jpg"
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      url: "mailto:<berger@mpib-berlin.mpg.de>"
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      url: "cv.pdf"
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/officialberger
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/julian-berger
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url:  https://linkedin.com/in/julian-berger-aa847b10a
---



Hello. I am currently working on my PhD at the Center for Adaptive Rationality at the [Max Planck Institute for Human Development](https://www.mpib-berlin.mpg.de/research/research-centers/adaptive-rationality) in Berlin.

I design systems to boost human decision making in complex problems. These systems rely on collective intelligence, machine learning and anything in-between. Check out [my projects](projects.qmd) here. You will learn about:

- How to use collective intelligence efficiently
- How to diagnose COVID-19 outcomes using interpretable machine learning
- How collective intelligence could help us better understand mental disorders


I also work as a freelance data scientist and machine learning engineer mainly focused on interpretable artificial intelligence. If you want to know more, shoot me an [email](mailto:<berger@mpib-berlin.mpg.de>).
